texto: In a health relationship, it should always be about them. Two people are involved. And both of them are risking their hearts, their souls, in order to stay together. If both parties don't support and appreciate the individuality of the other, the relationship won't work.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Lisa S. Lewis sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “In a health relationship, it should always be about them. Two people are involved. And both of th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, relationship, health, útil em momentos de trabalho e reflexao.

texto: Music was a balm for any weary soul. It could either lift a person out of the doldrums or comfort him if there was no other solace to be had.
